ValidationRule.description: Prevents CTBR Users from modifying Dealer and Customer Ship To Address
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(NATT_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Dealer",NATT_Account__r.RecordType.DeveloperName = "CTBR_Customer"), OR($Profile.Name = "CTBR General Manager",$Profile.Name = "CTBR Sales Manager",$Profile.Name = "CTBR Sales User"), ISPICKVAL(NATT_Type__c, "Units Ship To") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You may not create or modify a Units Ship To address for a Dealer and Customer
